title: 修复 ownership checker 对合法 no-active 状态的误判

sources.reason: Defines no_active_work_item and ownership evidence semantics.
Current ownership preview implementation that misclassifies generated no-active status.

problemStatement: After the last archived Work Item, the generated no-active cockpit status is a valid governance artifact but local diff ownership reports it as unowned, preventing the required verification loop from converging.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Generated no-active current_status.md is excluded from ownership violations.
Unrelated changed paths and invalid/manual status changes remain fail-closed.

riskAssessment.reason: The exception must be narrowly limited to the generator-owned no-active status and must not hide arbitrary changes.

executionDecision.reason: The failure is reproducible, the implementation boundary is explicit, and regression tests can verify both the exception and fail-closed behavior.

preReviewWarnings: Review that the generated-status exception cannot claim ordinary files or malformed status content.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Generated no-active current_status.md does not produce an unowned ownership finding.
The exception is narrow and invalid or unrelated changes remain reported.
Regression tests cover local and PR ownership preview behavior.
The AI Change Summary records verification and residual risk.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: A generated no-active cockpit status is a valid governance artifact, but the local ownership preview treats its refresh as an unowned change after archival.
constraints: Keep ownership checks fail-closed for ordinary and malformed files.
Do not change archive append-only behavior or claim unrelated paths.
intent.rationale: The status generator owns current_status.md when no active Work Item exists; recognizing that narrow generated state removes a false positive without weakening evidence requirements for real changes.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly instructed continued execution of the review-remediation loop, including generated .ai status evidence.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
